title: WA Robot Search Explain Response
description: Schema for the data field when calling 'wa robot search-explain <query>'. Returns ranked reasons why search results may be missing or incomplete.

query.description: The canonical query string after policy redaction

pane_filter.description: If set, the explanation was scoped to this pane_id

total_panes.description: Total panes considered when building the explanation context

observed_panes.description: Panes currently observed and eligible for indexing

ignored_panes.description: Panes excluded from indexing or search coverage

total_segments.description: Total indexed segments across the explanation context

reason.description: A single diagnosis for missing or incomplete search results

code.description: Stable reason code for machine consumption

suggestions.description: Suggested commands or actions to address the issue

evidence.description: Key/value evidence item associated with a diagnosis
